word: H8483 - תַּחְתִּים חׇדְשִׁי - Tachtîym Chodshîy - takh-teem' khod-shee' - Tahtim-hodshi

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּחתּים חדשׁי

Transliteration: tachtı̂ym chodshı̂y

Phonetic: takh-teem' khod-shee'

BDB Definition:

Tahtim-hodshi = "lowest-moon"
  1. a place near Gilead on the east of the Jordan

Origin: apparently from the pl. masc. of H8482 or H8478 and H2320

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
